classes.name: bilichat_request.exceptions.ResponseCodeError
documentation: 请求返回 code 不为 0

classes.name: bilichat_request.exceptions.ProssesError
documentation: 处理时的异常, 通常由于环境错误导致

classes.name: bilichat_request.exceptions.AbortError
documentation: 通常情况下是由外部因素 (如风控) 导致, 不影响其余任务执行的异常

classes.name: bilichat_request.exceptions.CaptchaAbortError
documentation: 由于风控导致需要验证码的异常

classes.name: bilichat_request.exceptions.NotFindAbortError
documentation: 未找到指定资源的异常

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Vip.type
documentation: 成员会员类型, 0: 无, 1: 月会员, 2: 年会员

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Vip.status
documentation: 会员状态, 0: 无, 1: 有

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Vip.due_date
documentation: 到期时间, UNIX 毫秒时间戳

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Vip.vip_pay_type
documentation: 会员支付类型, 作用尚不明确

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Vip.theme_type
documentation: 会员主题类型, 通常为0

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Vip.label
documentation: 会员标签信息, 作用尚不明确

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Official.role
documentation: 成员认证级别, 参考[用户认证类型一览](../user/official_role.md)

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Official.title
documentation: 成员认证名, 若没有则为空

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Official.desc
documentation: 成员认证备注, 若没有则为空

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Official.type
documentation: 成员认证类型, -1: 无, 0: 有认证

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.StaffMember.label_style
documentation: 作用尚不明确, 具体含义不清楚

classes.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.HonorReply
documentation: 包含当前稿件的荣誉回馈信息。

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.SubtitleAuthor.sex
documentation: 字幕上传者性别, 值为'男', '女', '保密'

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.SubtitleAuthor.rank
documentation: 会员等级, 作用尚不明确

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.SubtitleAuthor.birthday
documentation: 生日, 作用尚不明确

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.SubtitleAuthor.is_fake_account
documentation: 是否为假账号, 作用尚不明确

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.SubtitleAuthor.is_deleted
documentation: 是否已删除, 作用尚不明确

classes.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.SubtitlelistItem
documentation: 字幕列表中的单个字幕项。

classes.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Subtitle
documentation: 字幕信息对象, 包括是否允许提交字幕及字幕列表。

classes.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Dimension

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Dimension.rotate
documentation: 旋转标志, 0表示正常, 1表示对换宽高
视频分辨率信息, 包括宽度、高度和旋转信息。

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Page.from_
documentation: 视频来源, vupload: 普通上传, hunan: 芒果TV, qq: 腾讯

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Page.duration
documentation: 分P持续时间, 单位为秒

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Page.vid
documentation: 站外视频vid, 只有站外视频有效

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Page.weblink
documentation: 站外视频跳转url, 只有站外视频有效

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Page.dimension
documentation: 当前分P分辨率, 部分较老视频无分辨率值

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Rights.no_reprint
documentation: 是否显示“禁止转载”标志

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Stat.vt
documentation: 作用尚不明确, 恒为0

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Data.pubdate
documentation: 稿件发布时间, 秒级时间戳

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Data.ctime
documentation: 用户投稿时间, 秒级时间戳

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Data.duration
documentation: 稿件总时长, 单位为秒

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Data.forward
documentation: 撞车视频跳转avid, 仅撞车视频存在此字段

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Data.redirect_url
documentation: 重定向url, 仅番剧或影视视频存在此字段

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Data.dynamic
documentation: 视频同步发布的动态文字内容

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.video.Data.is_view_self
documentation: 是否为自己投稿的视频

classes.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.card.Pendant
documentation: Contains information about the user's pendant.

classes.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.card.Nameplate
documentation: Contains information about the user's nameplate.

classes.name: bilichat_request.functions.render.video.model.card.Data
documentation: Contains the main data of the response.

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.subs.live.model.LiveRoom.live_status
documentation: 直播间开播状态 (0: 未开播, 1: 正在直播, 2: 轮播中)

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.subs.live.model.LiveRoom.short_id
documentation: 直播间短房间号, 常见于签约主播

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.subs.live.model.LiveRoom.broadcast_type
documentation: 直播类型 (0:普通直播, 1: 手机直播)

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.subs.dynamic.model.DynamicType.FORWARD
documentation: 动态转发, 通常关联原始动态的ID

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.subs.dynamic.model.DynamicType.AV
documentation: 投稿视频, 包含视频的AV号

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.subs.dynamic.model.DynamicType.PGC
documentation: 剧集 (番剧、电影、纪录片) , 通常关联某一剧集的分集AV号

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.subs.dynamic.model.DynamicType.COURSES
documentation: 课程, 通常用于与学习平台相关的内容

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.subs.dynamic.model.DynamicType.WORD
documentation: 纯文字动态, 通常包含动态ID

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.subs.dynamic.model.DynamicType.DRAW
documentation: 带图动态, 通常包含相册ID

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.subs.dynamic.model.DynamicType.ARTICLE
documentation: 投稿专栏, 通常包含专栏的CV号

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.subs.dynamic.model.DynamicType.MUSIC
documentation: 音乐, 具体内容未明确

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.subs.dynamic.model.DynamicType.COMMON_SQUARE
documentation: 装扮、剧集点评、普通分享, 涉及个人装扮、剧集点评或其他普通分享

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.subs.dynamic.model.DynamicType.COMMON_VERTICAL
documentation: 未指定类型, 可能是系统内其他类型的占位符

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.subs.dynamic.model.DynamicType.LIVE
documentation: 直播间分享, 通常包含直播间ID

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.subs.dynamic.model.DynamicType.MEDIALIST
documentation: 收藏夹, 通常包含收藏夹的ML号

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.subs.dynamic.model.DynamicType.COURSES_SEASON
documentation: 课程季节, 通常包含课程的ID

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.subs.dynamic.model.DynamicType.COURSES_BATCH
documentation: 未指定类型, 可能是系统内其他类型的占位符

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.subs.dynamic.model.DynamicType.AD
documentation: 广告, 具体内容未明确

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.subs.dynamic.model.DynamicType.APPLET
documentation: 小程序, 具体内容未明确

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.subs.dynamic.model.DynamicType.SUBSCRIPTION
documentation: 订阅类型的动态, 通常与用户的订阅行为有关

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.subs.dynamic.model.DynamicType.LIVE_RCMD
documentation: 直播开播, 通常包含直播的ID

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.subs.dynamic.model.DynamicType.BANNER
documentation: 横幅类型的动态, 通常用于宣传或展示

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.subs.dynamic.model.DynamicType.UGC_SEASON
documentation: 合集更新, 通常与视频内容的AV号相关

class_variables.name: bilichat_request.functions.subs.dynamic.model.DynamicType.SUBSCRIPTION_NEW
documentation: 新的订阅动态, 具体内容未明确

methods.name: bilichat_request.adapters.web.WebRequester._encrypt_w_rid
documentation:
传入参数字符串返回签名和时间tuple[w_rid,wts]
-----------
params:str格式: qn=32&fnver=0&fnval=4048&fourk=1&voice_balance=1&gaia_source=pre-load&avid=593238479&bvid=BV16q4y1k7mq&cid=486645610

params:dict格式: {'qn': '32', 'fnver': '0', 'fnval': '4048', 'fourk': '1', 'voice_balance': '1', 'gaia_source': 'pre-load', 'avid': '593238479', 'bvid': 'BV16q4y1k7mq', 'cid': '486645610'}:
